session_summary: Bug fixes for server startup, scope errors, security warnings, and Waitress/SAP segmentation faults.

changes.description: Fixed UnboundLocalError and NameError by adding 'import pandas as pd' and reinstating 'df = pd.DataFrame(records)' before saving classifications to SQL.
Changed SQL_TRUST_CERTIFICATE from 'yes' to 'no' to resolve MITM security warnings.
Added timeout arguments (timeout=10, connectTimeout=10000) and a comprehensive Exception block with exc_info=True to prevent silent driver crashes during database connection drops.
Disabled the background _sync_loop on Windows environments (os.name == 'nt') to prevent hdbcli C-extension segmentation faults caused by Waitress multithreading thread forks.
Installed NSSM via winget and generated install_service.bat to configure watchdog.py as an automatic background Windows Service to ensure pre-production server uptime.
